scenes.purpose: Static parallax hero asset (no Veo motion in this build)
scenes.nano_banana_prompt: Wide cinematic photograph of an industrial automotive rental yard at golden hour, in Langley, British Columbia. Geometric formation of vehicles staged in two rows: in the foreground left, a working pickup truck in matte graphite; mid-frame center, a moving cube van; mid-frame right, a 7-passenger SUV; background right, a utility trailer. Asphalt with painted yellow lane markings, low-rise warehouse silhouette behind, mountains faintly visible at the horizon. Light: low orange sun raking from camera right, long machine-shadow rakes across the lot, no humans, no logos visible, cinematic 35mm depth of field, slight haze. Mood: practical, industrial, working yard, not luxury showroom. Aspect 16:9, 4K, photoreal, color graded warm graphite + amber accent.
scenes.negative: no exotic supercars, no luxury logos, no neon, no nighttime, no rain, no fictional vehicles, no people, no text overlay
